summary: Frontend testing of shared cart flow. Critical issues found: 1) Clicking 'Generate Quote' button in popup bypasses RfqSubmissionModal and submits directly, 2) Floating cart button opens old 'Quote Builder' modal instead of new CartViewModal, 3) data-testid attributes not rendering in React Native Web. Positive: Only ONE floating cart button visible (duplicate removed successfully).

critical.issue: Clicking 'Generate Quote' button in 'Item Added!' popup bypasses RfqSubmissionModal and submits quote directly without showing Packing Type, Freight Pincode, Customer RFQ No fields
critical.actual: Quote generated directly, success popup shows immediately

critical.issue: Clicking the floating cart button opens old 'Quote Builder' modal (with 'Save Quote' button) instead of shared CartViewModal (with 'Proceed to Submit' button)
data-testid attributes are not being rendered in React Native Web. All 0 elements found with data-testid attribute.
critical.note: This breaks all automated testing with data-testid selectors

integration_issues.issue: The 'Generate Quote' button in popup sets setShowSubmitModal(true) in code but RfqSubmissionModal does not render

passing_tests: Item Added! popup shows with correct item count and total
Only ONE floating cart button visible (duplicate removed successfully)
Quote generation API works (quote numbers created: Q/25-26/0055, Q/25-26/0056, etc.)
action_items: HIGH: Fix 'Generate Quote' button flow - RfqSubmissionModal should open before quote submission
HIGH: Fix floating cart button click - should open CartViewModal not Quote Builder
HIGH: Fix data-testid not rendering in React Native Web - use testID prop instead for RN components
Verify CartContext cartItems syncs properly with local quoteItems state
Check if showSubmitModal state is being reset unexpectedly
critical_code_review_comments: The code at line 2050 sets setShowSubmitModal(true) but the modal doesn't appear - check if another state is overriding it
FloatingCartButton onPress={() => setShowCartView(true)} at line 2088 should open CartViewModal, but something else is handling the click
data-testid is not valid for React Native - should use testID prop which React Native Web converts to data-testid
There may be two overlapping click handlers - the old quoteItems-based button and the new CartContext-based FloatingCartButton
context_for_next_testing_agent: The shared cart flow (FloatingCartButton -> CartViewModal -> RfqSubmissionModal) is not working. The old Quote Builder modal is somehow being triggered instead. Also, 'Generate Quote' button in popup bypasses RfqSubmissionModal. data-testid attributes need to be changed to testID for React Native Web compatibility.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_1: In React Native, the correct prop is 'testID' not 'data-testid'. React Native Web converts testID to data-testid, but using data-testid directly doesn't work.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_2: The floating cart button visible in UI might be from a different component/render branch than the new FloatingCartButton. There appears to be overlap where the old quote items logic is still intercepting clicks.
reproduction_steps: 5. Click 'Generate Quote' - ISSUE: Quote generates directly without RfqSubmissionModal
6. OR click 'Add More' then click floating cart button - ISSUE: Opens 'Quote Builder' not 'CartViewModal'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: 1. Change all data-testid to testID in React Native components. 2. Debug why showSubmitModal(true) doesn't render the modal. 3. Check if there's another click handler on the floating button area.
